unsupportedExecutions.message: node-webgpu execution unavailable for provider dawn on this Apple host
unsupportedExecutions.detail: Gemma64 on Apple Node/Dawn is explicitly unsupported on mac.lan after repeated direct reruns showed an intermittent host-specific Dawn package crash during the first queue.onSubmittedWorkDone wait after full setup. The same workload completes on Bun/bun-webgpu and Doe on this host.

unsupportedExecutions.message: node-webgpu execution unavailable for provider dawn on this Apple host
unsupportedExecutions.detail: Gemma1B on Apple Node/Dawn is explicitly unsupported on mac.lan after step-limit bisect and submit-boundary diagnostics showed a host-specific Dawn package crash in the final submit window. The same prefixes complete on Bun/bun-webgpu and Doe on this host.
